description_long: This is a rectangular kitchen island cabinet with a light blue countertop and a wooden base. The front side features open shelving with neatly stacked plates and bowls, as well as a microwave and a few small containers. The top surface is mostly clear except for a couple of small kitchen items, such as a cutting board and a cup. The cabinet is designed to be accessible from one side, with the other sides being solid panels. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in a kitchen or communal dining area. The materials and construction suggest it is sturdy and intended for frequent use.
description: A modern kitchen island cabinet with a blue countertop, open shelving for dishes, and a wooden base, featuring a few kitchen items on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves with plates, bowls, a microwave, and small containers, as well as the countertop with a few items.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the solid back panel of the cabinet with no visible shelves or contents.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid side panel and a glimpse of the countertop, with no shelving visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the open shelving with contents and the countertop with kitchen items.
